heading: Update a Secret
body:
To update the value of a Secret using the App Services CLI, run the
following command:

```shell
appservices secrets update --app=<Your App ID> \
  --secret="<Secret ID or Name>" \
  --name="<Updated Secret Name>" \
  --value="<Updated Value>"
```

codeBlocks.content:
appservices secrets update --app=<Your App ID> \
  --secret="<Secret ID or Name>" \
  --name="<Updated Secret Name>" \
  --value="<Updated Value>"
